name: TOP_PARTNER_TARGETS_BY_TARGET
description: Top partner targets co-occurring with one anchor target in target pairs, ranked by patent frequency.
cypher: MATCH (t:Target {symbol:$target})<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)-[:HAS_TARGET]->(pt:Target) WHERE pt.symbol <> $target MATCH (tp)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent) RETURN t.symbol AS target, pt.symbol AS partner_target, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count ORDER BY patent_count DESC, partner_target LIMIT 10;
